zh:

單行本第4卷特別版同捆OAD後篇。

ja:

単行本第4巻特別版同捆OAD後篇。

en:
OAD part 1 bundled with the special edition of manga volume 3.

OAD part 2 bundled with the special edition of manga volume 4.

OAD bundled with the special edition of manga volume 5.
